description_long: This is a standard traffic cone, commonly used for road safety and traffic management in urban environments. The cone is predominantly orange with two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircling its upper and middle sections, enhancing its visibility in low-light conditions. The body of the cone is conical and tapers smoothly to a rounded, solid tip at the top. Its base is a thick, square, black platform that provides stability and prevents tipping, likely made of a heavier material than the cone itself. The surface appears clean and free from visible damage, suggesting it is either new or very lightly used. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any part of the cone.
description: A bright orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes and a sturdy black square base, designed for high visibility and stability. The cone appears clean and undamaged, with no visible markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white stripes and the full square black base.
description_view_1: Similar to view 0, this angle highlights the smooth taper of the cone and the even placement of the stripes.
description_view_2: Rear view, showing the same features as the front, with the stripes and base clearly visible.
description_view_3: Another side view, emphasizing the uniformity of the cone's shape and the clean, undamaged surface.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the upper and middle sections of the cone.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is a thick, square, black platform, likely rubber, providing stability and weight; it appears solid and slightly textured.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos or markings are visible.
attribute_condition: The object appears new and clean, with no visible wear, fading, or damage.
